pullRequest.title: [DOM-55307] Feature flag test for disabling Datasets

nodes.body:
In general let's not use `wait` to not see something (unless the page dynamically updates), and instead have a step that ensures the page has loaded and then check with `I should not see` step.
```suggestion
      And I navigate to the url "{BASEURL}/data"
      # please add a check to verify that the page has loaded
     Then I should not see the tab "Domino Datasets"
```
